changed_types.change: new error type added (previously based on String errors)
added Serialize derive, added From<anyhow::Error>, From<String>
changed_types.old: enum VfsError (no Serialize, no From<anyhow>, no From<String>)

changed_types.change: added Serialize impl, added 9 From implementations, added From<DataGovernanceError> for String
changed_types.old: basic Display impl, no Serialize, minimal From impls
changed_types.new: manual Serialize with code+message fields, From<String>, From<anyhow>, From<rusqlite>, From<io>, From<serde_json>, From<VfsError>, From<AcquireError>, From<BackupError>, From<SyncError>
enum AppErrorType (impl Display, serializes variant names as strings)

RAG adapter functionality migrated to pipeline
